program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Presenting financial numbers in a strategic meeting -- revenue, budget, growth and targets -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- Numbers, Budget & Forecast
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 6 -- Numbers, Budget & Forecast

listenings.text: Hello, everyone. Let me summarize our targets for next year. First, we want higher revenue. The forecast is strong, and our target is twenty percent growth. Second, we want lower costs. We must spend less and stay under the budget. The numbers from this year are very good. The revenue increased, and the growth is higher than last year. Thank you, and let us reach these targets together.

Hi Fernando, this is David. I want to talk about the budget for the clinical research. The amount this year is higher than last year. We spent more on the new study, but the revenue also increased. The forecast for next year is good. Our target is to grow the research, not to decrease it. Please check the numbers and call me back. Thanks.
